name: Palmyra Med 70B
license: Writer Open Model License (non-commercial, research use)
archDisplay: Dense Transformer fine-tuned from Palmyra-X-003 (~70B) via DPO on biomedical instructions
note: Healthcare specialist; zero-shot 85.9% avg across 9 biomedical benchmarks beats Med-PaLM-2's 5-shot 84%.

results.notes: Same NVIDIA developer blog benchmark table already cited for the model's other 3 results rows; PubMedQA column.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real. SiliconAngle article dated 2024-07-31 confirms the Palmyra-Med-70B/Palmyra-Fin-70B announcement and the 85.9% zero-shot figure. HF Writer/Palmyra-Med-70B confirms: license 'writer-open-model-license' restricted to non-commercial/research use (matches record), base model Palmyra-X-003, context length 8192 (matches ctxK=8), actual param count ~71B (record's 70 matches the model's own '70B' naming). NVIDIA developer blog confirms all four result rows literally: 85.9% average, 90.9% clinical knowledge, 94% medical genetics, 83.7% anatomy. Confirmed apiAvailable via Writer API / Baseten / prior NVIDIA NIM catalog listing (the specific NIM reference URL in the record is a generic docs-domain link, not independently re-verified as a live endpoint).
